overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in an armored spacesuit exploring a futuristic laboratory or medical bay with holographic displays and teal-green ambient lighting, accompanied by an NPC scientist in a white lab coat.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic laboratory with medical equipment and holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the laboratory toward the holographic displays at the back of the room, passing medical equipment on the left

notable_agents.action: scientist in white lab coat standing and observing the player character

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with medical supplies and equipment
large interactive display screen showing blue holographic schematics
small round rolling stools with yellow seats scattered around the room
exposed industrial piping and fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit futuristic laboratory with teal-green ambient lighting. Medical supply cabinets line the left side while a scientist in a white lab coat stands to the right. The character approaches a large holographic display at the far end of the room, passing small rolling stools and industrial ceiling fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: main console area with large holographic ship display

events.description: character stops at the holographic console to examine the ship diagram up close

agents.ego_description: examining the holographic ship diagram on the main console, standing close to the display and looking at the schematics

notable_agents.action: scientist remaining near the back wall, observing the player from a distance

entered.detail: blue holographic projection of a spaceship with technical readouts and schematics
illuminated control panels and keyboards below the main holographic screen

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the main holographic console to examine a detailed 3D diagram of a spaceship displayed in blue light. The camera focuses on the interactive screen showing ship schematics and technical readouts while the scientist NPC remains visible in the background near the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary medical station with examination equipment

events.description: character turns away from the main console and walks toward the side medical station

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the main console and walking to a secondary medical station on the left side of the room

entered.detail: smaller workstation with monitors and medical equipment against the left wall
padded medical chair with armrests and adjustable height
rolling metal cart with trays holding medical instruments and supplies
multiple screens mounted on the back wall displaying data readouts

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks away from the main console toward a secondary medical station equipped with an examination chair and equipment cart. The movement reveals additional wall monitors and medical storage units in the corner of the laboratory, while the main holographic display moves out of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit futuristic laboratory that shifts from a general exploration of the room to a focused technical examination before moving toward a medical station. It begins with the character walking past medical supply cabinets and rolling stools under teal-green ambient lighting, accompanied by a scientist in a white lab coat. As the character reaches the far end of the room, the camera focuses on a large holographic console displaying a detailed 3D spaceship diagram and technical readouts in blue light. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the main display, moving toward a secondary medical station equipped with an examination chair and equipment cart. This final movement reveals additional wall monitors and storage units in the corner of the lab as the primary holographic display fades from view.
